message:
fix: read-path metadata mutation (#216) and false FK violations (#215)

Two related correctness bugs in the SQLite storage layer:

1. br ready (and other read commands) mutated blocked_cache_state
   metadata as a side effect. Read-path methods now compute blocked
   state in-memory when the cache is stale, reserving cache persistence
   for write operations and doctor/repair only.

2. After ~109 parent-child iterations, fsqlite's page buffer pool
   exhaustion caused false FOREIGN KEY constraint failures. Disable
   FK enforcement during write transactions since application logic
   already validates referential integrity within mutation closures.

Fixes #215, Fixes #216

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
